questions.title: How much does our food contribute to climate change?
questions.subtitle: yearly greenhouse gas emissions worldwide

answerExplanation.text:
Our global food system causes one-third of all emissions.

On your Fork Ranger journey, you’re going to explore the most important sources of these emissions and what we can do about it

questions.recipeSubtitle: This was the first Fork Ranger recipe and it has become a favorite of dozens of people.

questions.title: What can save more CO2 emissions?

answerExplanation.text:
The most effective way to reduce the footprint of our food is to eat less meat and dairy.

You don’t have to become a vegetarian to be part of the solution. A few simple changes can make a massive difference.

questions.recipeSubtitle: Most of us need to eat more veggies and this recipe makes that a lot easier.

questions.title: Which solution can save the most CO2?
questions.subtitle: global CO2e reduction according to Project Drawdown

answerExplanation.text:
There is no single magical solution to climate change and we need all of them. But we are inspired by the fact that our personal food choices play such a big role.

It’s all about exploring a new version of The Good Life:

Less meat, more plants.
Less flying, more adventure.
Less stuff, more memories.

questions.recipeSubtitle: Curry recipes like this one are one of the easiest ways to eat more plant-based meals.
